data.acceptance:
1. `kno doctor` run from any directory iterates over every registered project whose path exists and is openable, running all applicable checks against each.
2. Unreachable projects (missing path or unopenable state) produce a single `unreachable:` line, not a hard failure.
3. Output is grouped per-project with the project name as a section header.
4. `--json` output has one top-level key per project, with each project containing the check results.
5. `kno doctor --fix` applies each check's fix in every project where the check failed.
6. Existing single-repo checks (lock_health, worktree, remote, hooks, workflow_registry, schema_version, stuck_leases, terminal_parents, skills_*, cold_tier_imbalance) all work cross-project.
7. Version check runs once per invocation, not per-project.
8. Doctor on 20 accessible projects completes in under 5 seconds on a warm machine.
